The '''''Emerald Twilight''''' was the starship of [[Sheel Odala]]. She used it on her trip to [[Void Station]] where she fell in with an [[Han Solo/Legends|old acquaintance]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 25|''Empire'' 25]]
